en: Paul, called by the will of God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, and our brother Sosthenes,
zh: 奉 神旨意蒙召作基督耶穌使徒的保羅，和蘇提尼弟兄，

en: To the church of God that is in Corinth, to those sanctified in Christ Jesus, called to be saints together with all those who in every place call upon the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, both their Lord and ours:
zh: 寫信給在哥林多 神的教會，就是在基督耶穌裡已經被分別為聖，蒙召為聖徒的人，和所有在各地呼求我們主耶穌基督的名的人。基督是他們的主，也是我們的主。

en: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
zh: 願恩惠平安從我們的父 神和主耶穌基督臨到你們。

en: I give thanks to my God always for you because of the grace of God that was given you in Christ Jesus,
zh: 我因著 神在基督耶穌裡賜給你們的恩典，常常為你們感謝我的 神，

en: that in every way you were enriched in him in all speech and all knowledge-
zh: 因為你們在他裡面凡事都富足，很有口才，知識豐富，

en: even as the testimony about Christ was confirmed among you-
zh: 就如我們為基督所作的見證在你們中間得到堅立一樣，

en: so that you are not lacking in any spiritual gift, as you wait for the revealing of our Lord Jesus Christ,
zh: 以致你們在恩賜上一無所缺，殷切盼望著我們主耶穌基督的顯現；

en: who will sustain you to the end, guiltless in the day of our Lord Jesus Christ.
zh: 他也必堅定你們到底，使你們在我們主耶穌基督的日子無可指摘。

en: God is faithful, by whom you were called into the fellowship of his Son, Jesus Christ our Lord.
zh: 神是信實的，他呼召了你們，是要你們與他的兒子我們主耶穌基督連合在一起。

en: I appeal to you, brothers, by the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, that all of you agree and that there be no divisions among you, but that you be united in the same mind and the same judgment.
zh: 弟兄們，我憑著我們主耶穌基督的名，勸你們大家要同心，在你們中間不要分黨，只要在同一的心思、同一的意念上團結起來。

en: For it has been reported to me by Chloe's people that there is quarreling among you, my brothers.
zh: 我的弟兄們，革來氏家裡的人向我提到你們，說你們中間有紛爭。

en: What I mean is that each one of you says, "I follow Paul," or "I follow Apollos," or "I follow Cephas," or "I follow Christ."
zh: 我的意思就是，你們各人說，我是保羅派的，我是亞波羅派的，我是磯法派的，我是基督派的。

en: Is Christ divided? Was Paul crucified for you? Or were you baptized in the name of Paul?
zh: 基督是分開的嗎？保羅為你們釘了十字架嗎？你們受洗是歸入保羅的名下嗎？

en: I thank God that I baptized none of you except Crispus and Gaius,
zh: 我感謝 神，除了基利司布和該猶以外，我沒有給你們任何人施過洗，

en: so that no one may say that you were baptized in my name.
zh: 所以你們沒有人可以說是受洗歸入我名下的。

en: (I did baptize also the household of Stephanas. Beyond that, I do not know whether I baptized anyone else.)
zh: 我也給司提反一家的人施過洗；此外，有沒有給別人施過洗，我就不記得了。

en: For Christ did not send me to baptize but to preach the gospel, and not with words of eloquent wisdom, lest the cross of Christ be emptied of its power.
zh: 基督差遣我，不是要我去施洗，而是去傳福音；不是靠著智慧的言論去傳，免得基督的十字架失去了效力。

en: For the word of the cross is folly to those who are perishing, but to us who are being saved it is the power of God.
zh: 因為十字架的道理，對走向滅亡的人來說是愚笨的，但對我們這些得救的人，卻是 神的大能。

en: For it is written, "I will destroy the wisdom of the wise, and the discernment of the discerning I will thwart."
zh: 因為經上記著說： “我要滅絕智慧人的智慧， 廢棄聰明人的聰明。”

en: Where is the one who is wise? Where is the scribe? Where is the debater of this age? Has not God made foolish the wisdom of the world?
zh: 智慧人在哪裡？經學家在哪裡？今世的辯士在哪裡？ 神不是使屬世的智慧變成了愚笨嗎？

en: For since, in the wisdom of God, the world did not know God through wisdom, it pleased God through the folly of what we preach to save those who believe.
zh: 因為在 神的智慧裡，世人憑自己的智慧，既然不能認識 神， 神就樂意藉著所傳的愚笨的道理，去拯救那些信的人。

en: For Jews demand signs and Greeks seek wisdom,
zh: 猶太人要求神蹟，希臘人尋找智慧，

en: but we preach Christ crucified, a stumbling block to Jews and folly to Gentiles,
zh: 我們卻傳揚釘十字架的基督；在猶太人看來是絆腳石，在外族人看來是愚笨的，

en: but to those who are called, both Jews and Greeks, Christ the power of God and the wisdom of God.
zh: 但對那些蒙召的人，不論是猶太人或希臘人，基督是 神的能力， 神的智慧。

en: For the foolishness of God is wiser than men, and the weakness of God is stronger than men.
zh: 因為 神的愚笨總比人智慧， 神的軟弱總比人剛強。

en: For consider your calling, brothers: not many of you were wise according to worldly standards, not many were powerful, not many were of noble birth.
zh: 弟兄們，你們想想，你們這些蒙召的，按人 來看有智慧的不多，有權勢的不多，出身尊貴的也不多。

en: But God chose what is foolish in the world to shame the wise; God chose what is weak in the world to shame the strong;
zh: 但是 神卻揀選了世上愚笨的，使那些有智慧的羞愧。他也揀選了世上軟弱的，使那些剛強的羞愧。

en: God chose what is low and despised in the world, even things that are not, to bring to nothing things that are,
zh: 他也揀選了世上卑賤的和被人輕視的，以及算不得甚麼的，為了要廢棄那些自以為是的，

en: so that no human being might boast in the presence of God.
zh: 使所有的人在 神面前都不能自誇。

en: He is the source of your life in Christ Jesus, whom God made our wisdom and our righteousness and sanctification and redemption.
zh: 你們因著 神得以在基督耶穌裡，他使基督成了我們的智慧；就是公義、聖潔和救贖，

en: Therefore, as it is written, "Let the one who boasts, boast in the Lord."
zh: 正如經上所說的： “誇口的應當靠著主誇口。”
